content:
💡 swaptop | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Monitoring and visualizing swap memory usage on Linux and Windows systems through a text-based user interface.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time animated swap usage graph • List Swap devices with usage per disk / type • Process-level swap consumption tracking • Grouped view by software (aggregate mode) • Multiple color themes
📖 Summary: Swaptop is a real-time swap usage monitor for Linux and Windows systems, featuring a TUI interface that displays swap consumption per process and per software. It provides live-updating graphs, multiple color themes, and unit conversion, all with a lightweight memory footprint.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
